traits.name: Clan Mech
traits.description:
Clan mechs lack much of the safety and redundancy of other mech frames, only having 3 structure. However, each is fully customized to their pilot - gaining additional benefits from skills as detailed with the Chanur Clansmith core bonuses.
- begin each battle with 1 Overshield per Engineering
- increase Save Target by 1 for every 3 points of Systems
- first ranged attack each round has ranged increased by Agility
- may Overcharge without gaining heat for each 3 points of Hull

traits.name: Warrior Instinct
traits.description: 1/round, when a character within Threat range of one of your melee weapons makes a ranged attack, you may make an Overwatch attack against them.

core_system.name: Pride of Chanur
core_system.passive_effect: You are adept at fighting Vulnerable targets. These include any target which is Prone, Immobilized, Impaired, Jammed, or Stunned. Against such targets you deal 1d6 bonus damage.

active_actions.name: Clanfang
active_actions.trigger: An ally hits a Vulnerable target
